metadata.title:
VARIETY OF LIVE STOCK


AT INTERSTATE FAIR

pages.raw_text:
"The Interstate fair will have the
largest and best exhibit of live stock
and horses ever held in the Pacific
northwest" said Superintendent John
l.. Smith this morning.


Beef cattle--W. o. Miner of Hepp-
ner will send shorthorns; c. Il. Ladd
of Portland. shorthorns: Governor
Sparks of Nevada, Hereford; Hon. A.
J. splawn OF North Yakima. Polled
Angus and Herefords: Metcker &
Clemgard OF Pullman. shorthorns.


Dairy stock class-Three Scapoosa
(ore.) raisers will show for the first
time. MFR. West will have dozen
Jerseys. all high priced cows. Hon
eymoon Bros. will exhibit Ayrshire
cattle and Mr.. Frinks. Holsteins. ].
II. Looney OF Jefferson. Ore, will ex-
hibit Jerseys.


The Hazelwood Dairy company will
make a speciality this year of hogs
